reasoning: The recent one-month trend is downward, dropping from 7.12 in early November to 7.04 by late December 2025. The linear trend projection assigns a short-term exceedance probability of ~0.25, while adjusting for seasonality gives ~0.46. Taking a blended view reflecting near-term downward momentum, the probability for the end of December is around 0.38. As per the stated forecasting rules, uncertainty increases over the forecast horizon, bringing the predictions for January and March 2026 progressively closer to the 0.50 baseline.
